message:
fix(rpc): pass issueID via closure to prevent empty mutation events

handleSimpleStoreOp callers passed depArgs.FromID/labelArgs.ID directly
as the issueID parameter, but these were evaluated before unmarshal so
were always empty strings. Change to func() string so the ID is read
after json.Unmarshal populates the args struct.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
